title: Social Network for Freelancers
body: Another of  [my projects](http://www.xarop.com/category/works/) for [Socialtec](http://www.xarop.com/tag/socialtec/) was the design of the brand identity, the (user interfaces), and the various graphic elements that make up the social network aimed at freelancers, professionals, and SMEs,  [**econred**](http://www.econred.es/ "econred - the community for freelancers and SMEs") (acronym for Economia en Red) [![](http://farm5.static.flickr.com/4117/5050727658_c72d703dfe.jpg)](http://www.flickr.com/photos/diluvi/5050727658/ "post55-home by diluvi, on Flickr") As a freelancer myself, I appreciate this new resource—it’s more than necessary and long-awaited, since in this country it seems that the self-employed have been somewhat overlooked, even though I believe they are the ones who, through their effort and dedication, can help us emerge from this crisis. [Visit econred.es](http://www.econred.es "Community for the self-employed and SMEs")
